Applying to 01001010
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0

Output
0 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
